name: Intel Celeron G6900
description: An entry-level dual-core processor suited for very basic tasks like web browsing and document editing.

name: Intel Core i3-12100
description: A capable quad-core processor that handles everyday computing comfortably, with built-in graphics.

name: AMD Ryzen 5 5600
description: A fast six-core processor popular for gaming and multitasking, but requires a dedicated graphics card.

name: Intel Core i5-13400
description: A powerful ten-core processor that excels at demanding workloads and gaming, with built-in graphics.
